endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/privateLinkScopes
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScopes within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/privateEndpointConnections
endpoints.description: Gets all private endpoint connections on a private link scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Approve or reject a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/privateEndpointConnections/{privateEndpointConnectionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{PRIVATEENDPOINTCONNECTIONNAME}} with a real privateendpointconnectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/privateLinkResources
endpoints.description: Gets the private link resources that need to be created for a Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/privateLinkResources/{groupName}
endpoints.description: Gets the private link resources that need to be created for a Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{GROUPNAME}} with a real groupname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/scopedResources
endpoints.description: Gets all private endpoint connections on a private link scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/scopedResources/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets a scoped resource in a private link scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}/scopedResources/{name}
endpoints.description: Approve or reject a private endpoint connection with a given name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/privateLinkScopes
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScopes within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}
endpoints.description: Creates (or updates) a Azure Monitor PrivateLinkScope. Note: You cannot specify a different value for InstrumentationKey nor AppId in the Put operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/privateLinkScopes/{scopeName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing PrivateLinkScope's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCOPENAME}} with a real scopename.
